Yellowstone National Park in Wyoming is also mentioned for similar reasons. The question is about Lily's interests in nature and American history. The Grand Canyon is definitely a natural site (Arizona) which fits the nature interest. Rodeo Drive is in Los Angeles, which is more of a shopping area.
